releases.release_description:
## What's Changed
* Add snapshot plugin by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1836
* Add og tags on shareable views by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1837
* formulas: add BGRNReP and RGBNReP as used by the Micasense Rededge-P by @maurerle in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1841
* Import orthophotos, DEMs, point clouds from external sources by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1838

## New Contributors
* @maurerle made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1841

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v3.1.2...v3.1.3

## What's Changed
* Improved DroneDB plugin by @HeDo88TH in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1801
* Preserve XMP metadata when resizing images, 16bit and 32bit resize support, multithreaded processing by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1830
* Add pipeline option groups and enhance EditPresetDialog UI by @thadwald in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1820

## New Contributors
* @thadwald made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1820

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v3.1.1...v3.1.2

## What's Changed
* Add extra environment debugging information in webodm.sh by @wloxyz in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1818
* Update GeoDeep by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1821
* Show start processing with resize option when task commit is stuck by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1823
* Enable HTTP2 by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1827

## New Contributors
* @wloxyz made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1818

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v3.1.0...v3.1.1

## What's Changed
* Export rasters and point clouds with custom PROJ by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1812
* Add platform specific GLB rendering by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1814
* Fix 3D button URL in map view with single task by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1815
* Add support for CRSes not in the EPSG database by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1816
* iOS point budget and textured model tweaks by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1817
* This release was funded by [WebODM Lightning](https://webodm.net) ❤️

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v3.0.1...v3.1.0

## What's Changed
* Update rasterio, remove rio-cogeo dependency, patch rio-tiler by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1792
* Install rasterio 1.3.10.post1 on arm due to missing numpy rc dependency by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1793
* Potree dynamic unit measurements support by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1795
* Fix mileage unit conversion by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1796
* Revamp docs, move information from README to docs by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1798
* Add settings.PLUGINS_CORE_IGNORE_SCRIPTS to workaround an issue under the MSIX PSF by @sylveon in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1800
* Fix colormap decoding by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1803
* Check JPEG export raster limit by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1808
* Add start processing button during image upload by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1809
* Add ability to notify remote endpoint when quota is being exceeded by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1810
* Fix zlib corruption errors while importing archives by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1811

## Sponsors

This release was funded by [WebODM Lightning](https://webodm.net) ❤️

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v3.0.0...v3.0.1

## What's Changed
* Fix getArea() by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1784
* Update node-odm image to stable version by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1786
* Update eventlet to fix Windows compatibility issues by @sylveon in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1787
* Enable access log and log rotation by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1789
* Support for non-UTM coordinate systems, GCP improvements, 3D model view improvements by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1785
* Override CRS when generating DEM tiles by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1790


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.9.5...v3.0.0

## What's Changed
* Add auto login setting by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1766
* Plugins Developer Guide by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1767
* Add some directories to dockerignore by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1769
* Add server timeout checks during uploads by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1776
* Queries optimization by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1777
* Commit retries by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1779
* Cluster Data Export/Import, Raster Download Progress by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1727
* Update piexif by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1780
* Add camera position information in popup by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1781
* Add PDF report popup, rearrange buttons, improve layout by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1783


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.9.4...v2.9.5

## What's Changed
* Support for safe textured models by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1745
* Drag & Drop improvements, recursive folder drop support by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1749
* Minor fixes in Units.js by @dokterbob in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1753
* Allow all annotations to be displayed by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1759
* Add support for importing untiled point clouds by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1760
* Add admin used quota endpoint by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1764
* Update docs by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1765


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.9.1...v2.9.4

## What's Changed
* Update formulas.py by @cvandenbergTrace in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1723
* Change parallel uploads 6 --> 4 by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1725
* Remove stars effect by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1729
* Always simplify by at least 1cm when calculating contours by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1730
* Better bounds check, limit contours interval by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1731
* Avoid prematurely setting a task to completed status by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1736
* Swap lat/lon because of behavior change in 3rd party libs by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1739
* Fix GeoJSON axis swap, invalidate tile cache during crop by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1740
* Chunked Image Uploads by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1741

## New Contributors
* @cvandenbergTrace made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1723

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.9.0...v2.9.1

## What's Changed
* Multistage Docker / Ubuntu 22.04 WIP by @dokterbob in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1672
* Utility script to run tests through Docker by @dokterbob in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1683
* Allow selectively testing (parts) front/backend with arguments by @dokterbob in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1682
* Do not override venv when launching in dev mode, keep git by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1689
* Update requirements.txt to work on Windows by @sylveon in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1696
* fix: format string in log message by @NtskwK in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1697
* Update middleman 4.6.1 by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1702
* Improvements to raster exports by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1706
* Add cutline to downloadable assets when/if available by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1699
* Catch file not found error on task import by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1707
* Angle crop by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1711
* Worker time limits by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1713
* Fix GCP resize bug by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1714
* Remove systemd write up by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1715
* Improve cache hits during raster export by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1719

## New Contributors
* @sylveon made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1696

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.8.3...v2.9.0

## What's Changed
* Improve console output management by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1662
* Avoid locking users out of a map with an invalid crop by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1664
* Configurable worker count. Closes #1668. by @dokterbob in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1669
* Overhaul/cleanup of main Dockerfile by @dokterbob in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1670
* Multispectral fixes + crop fixes by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1677
* Fix thermal RGB exports by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1680

## New Contributors
* @dokterbob made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1669

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.8.1...v2.8.3

## What's Changed
* Cleanup empty projects when quota = 0 by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1648
* Orphaned project folders handling by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1650
* Plugin enable/disable "fix" by @tenchirocom in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1653
* Fix layer ordering in project map view, display annotations only for first task by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1654
* Intersection over area project map display by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1655
* Cluster mode utils by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1657
* Camera thumb zoom by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1658
* Pan support, mobile support for zoom/pan by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1659

## New Contributors
* @tenchirocom made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1653

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.8.0...v2.8.1

## What's Changed
* Add IPV6 Support by @as598466 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1638
* Update README.md by @as598466 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1639
* Cropping by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1636
* Sanitize import URLs by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1640
* Update webodm.sh by @as598466 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1645

## New Contributors
* @as598466 made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1638

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.7.3...v2.8.0

## What's Changed
* Respect processing nodes visibility permissions by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1629
* Pass requests to Gunicorn via HTTP 1.1 by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1631
* Replace zipfly --> zipstream-ng by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1632
* Share Project Links by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1633


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.7.2...v2.7.3

## What's Changed
* Add user search by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1621
* Add hosted instance link alert by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1623
* Add 172.16 /12 as Private IP Range by @jet86 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1626
* Fix thermal layer name in project map view, add compact feature, onboarding settings by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1628

## New Contributors
* @jet86 made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1626

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.7.1...v2.7.2

## What's Changed
* Update README.md by @chrisgla in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1611
* Geolocation file download, task thumbnails, task alignment support by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1615

## New Contributors
* @chrisgla made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1611

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.7.0...v2.7.1

## What's Changed
* Simultaneous map items display and swipe view by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1597
* Fix contours, objdetect plugins by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1604
* Handle PIL decompression bomb error by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1608


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.6.0...v2.7.0

## What's Changed
* Update gunicorn to 19.8.0 fixing #1586 by @hauke96 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1587
* AI Object Detection by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1589
* Add point cloud resampling export by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1590
* Add worker max threads by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1593
* Update GeoDeep, more object detection classes by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1594

## New Contributors
* @hauke96 made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1587

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.5.7...v2.6.0

## What's Changed
* Add full screen button to plot gps map view by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1574
* Add warning message when 999 images are selected by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1577
* Dronedb plugin fix by @HeDo88TH in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1576
* Handle import chunk retries by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1578
* Reduce memory usage in DEMs rasterization by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1579
* More memory optimizations for RGB/HSV conversion, duplicate filename uploads by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1583
* More consistent hillshading across zoom levels by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1584
* JS bundle optimization, placeholder loading screens by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1585


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.5.6...v2.5.7

## What's Changed
* group  installations instructions  by @sbonaime in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1544
* Update README.md by @NtskwK in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1548
* feat: instructions of GPU acceleration by @NtskwK in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1549
* unitBackward fix by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1557
* Create BIGTIFF output during export if needed by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1559
* Hide Add Project button when user doesn't have permissions by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1561
* Public edits by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1568
* Links for 3D meshes support by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1571

## New Contributors
* @NtskwK made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1548

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.5.5...v2.5.6

## What's Changed
* Add flight path preview when selecting images by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1530
* Minor fix for lightning plugin by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1533
* Restore the Cesium Ion Plugin by @kendallaeroai in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1536
* Fix docker-compose command by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1537
* Add plugin to get align from WCS service (geoserver) by @diegoaces in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1538
* Safari Fixes, delete fix by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1542

## New Contributors
* @kendallaeroai made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1536

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.5.4...v2.5.5

## What's Changed
* Add temperature units support by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1521
* fix: add blank=True to plugindatum's user field by @samul-1 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1523
* Use StreamingHttpResponse when downloading zip streams by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1527

## New Contributors
* @samul-1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1523

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.5.3...v2.5.4

## What's Changed
* Update README.md to reflect no gitter by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1502
* Fix #1505 add a signal to notify that we are resizing images by @diegoaces in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1506
* Minor improvements to Units support by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1504
* Fix layer panel scrolling by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1507
* Update README.md to reflect docker-compose change by @smathermather in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1508
* Fix unit selector background color by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1509
* Add task backup import/export by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1510
* remove line from hard recovery script by @probably-not-porter in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1514
* Add GPS location plugin by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1515
* Mobile improvements by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1516
* Add restart confirmation by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1517
* Update OpenStreetMap provider in Basemaps.js by @danieldegroot2 in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1519
* Thermal as a first class citizen by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1520

## New Contributors
* @probably-not-porter made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1514
* @danieldegroot2 made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1519

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.5.0...v2.5.3

## What's Changed
* Fix file size check on upload error retry by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1497
* Use export format AUTO for KMZ by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1498
* Add file size check on upload by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1499
* Imperial units support, improvements, fixes, plugins API expansion by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1496


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/compare/v2.4.2...v2.5.0

## What's Changed
* Add --worker-cpus option by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1443
* Update PyODM by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1447
* Upgrade Node 14 to Node 20 by @chris-bateman in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1439
* Update README.md by @douw in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1458
* Remove django-compressor by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1459
* Fixed typo in README.md by @flyinmryan in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1460
* Fix error shadowing in log when plugin fails to load by @gonzalo-bulnes in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1467
* Add task ID to expanded list item by @gonzalo-bulnes in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1468
* Fix user-facing misspelling, improve a few user-facing strings by @gonzalo-bulnes in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1472
* Update README.md by @Zuline in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1474
* Update README.md by @Zuline in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1475
* Automatically select 2/98 percentile values in plant health by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1484
* Ability to share particular map type by @pierotofy in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1485

## New Contributors
* @douw made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1458
* @flyinmryan made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1460
* @gonzalo-bulnes made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1467
* @Zuline made their first contribution in https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/WebODM/pull/1474

## What's Changed
